name: runanywhere-sdks-root
_workspaces_note: Three workspace roots reference sdk/shared/proto-ts (@runanywhere/proto-ts) by different relative paths: (1) this repo-root yarn workspace covers proto-ts + RN packages + RN example; (2) sdk/runanywhere-react-native/package.json is a yarn workspace root for standalone RN dev (`../shared/proto-ts`); (3) sdk/runanywhere-web/package.json is an npm workspace root for the web SDK (`../shared/proto-ts`). All three resolve proto-ts via workspace:* when `install` is run from their respective roots; this lets each SDK lane operate standalone in CI without dragging in the others. Future consolidation: move web SDK into this yarn workspace once npm-vs-yarn lockfile policy is decided.
